name: State and Local Launch Framework
purpose: Generate a location-aware launch checklist that points founders to official state and local agencies for verification.
questionsToAsk: Will the selected address trigger zoning, occupancy, or signage requirements?
Does the activity require health, liquor, contractor, or professional licensing?
scoringModel: Score official-link coverage, state specificity, local specificity, activity specificity, verification date, and founder-note completeness.
Increase confidence when an official agency source was recently checked.
Require local verification before location commitments.
qualityChecks: Use official state and local agency links.
Show when each task is needed.
suggestedDataSources: secretary of state or corporation commission
warnings: Verify with the official state and local agency before filing.
This checklist is planning support, not legal or tax advice.
